channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black bags and cushion on cadet drive, 12th March
item.description:
Dumped items on cadet drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cadet Drive, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lit bollard detached, 12th March
item.description:
The lit bollard on the traffic island outside Sainsbury's Local has been knocked down again. (Please could someone remind the contractor to replace it so that the arrow is visible to oncoming traffic this time, too!)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights are not working, 12th March
item.description:
The pass way between 48 lynmouth road to lampard grove opposite 26 ,all the lights are off and pitch dark already 2 weeks please sort it out ASAP it's very dangerous
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple deep potholes in both direction along this part of Vera Avenue, 12th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes around the area marked on Vera Avenue in both directions and central elongated potholes between each lane
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vera Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two deepening potholes on Winchmore Hill Road, 12th March
item.description:
Two deepening potholes on Winchmore Hill Road when travelling north east (away from Southgate Tube Station) as you go past Marks and Spencer). Have been there for over two months and are dangerously deep
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchmore Hill Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole at junction to right side of lane just before give way line when turning right from Bush Hill to Bush Hill Road., 12th March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for over two months. In addition to the pothole at the give way line at the junction turning from Bush Hill onto Bush Hill Road, there is a deepening ridge across the different road surfaces some 10 meters before this junction on Bush Hill going onto Bush Hill Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bush Hill Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorn Buses traffic controller box, 12th March
item.description:
Pit located behind the traffic signal controller is covered by thorn bushes- require bushes to be cut back behind controller
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 deepening potholes around the roundabout and one exiting the roundabout onto Merrivale when travelling west, 12th March
item.description:
Potholes around the roundabout and one coming off yhe roundabout into Merrivale when travelling west.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sheringham Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate language daubed on lamppost, 12th March
item.description:
Inappropriate language daubed on lamppost

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Curtismill Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess, 12th March
item.description:
Constant dog mess on this road, particularly around numbers 6 to 10. I live on this road, and I'm completely blind so cannot even see it to avoid it and it is becoming a real problem. Please can you put a camera in place to monitor who this is?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Waldegrave Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole getting bigger by the day., 11th March
item.description:
Pot hole next to it was fixed but a new one has appeared. Getting bigger by the day as it’s on a bus route.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Sydenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped by a full litter bin, 11th March
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 11th March
item.description:
Lots of broken glass, including small and large shards covering areas of footpath en route to primary School
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding, 11th March
item.description:
Blocked drain at junction of CHurch Court and Rotherhithe Street causing regular flooding

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near the bus shelter, 11th March
item.description:
There are numerous potholes along Raydon street, causing the whole building to shake when a car or bus drives over them. This has been ongoing for several months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raydon Street, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The beeps do not work, 11th March
item.description:
When it is time to cross the road the lights do not beep to let blind people know it is time to cross. There are at least two blind people on one of the roads nearby who use this crossing frequently and they struggle as a result. The noise should be activated to ensure that we are not wrongly putting people at risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and dog poo along street, 11th March
item.description:
Everyday there is a see of rubbish both on the pavement and in road along kerb as well as dog poo. The school kids have to dodge this kind of stuff everyday.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Felmingham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned/Stored Bicycles on Footway, 11th March
item.description:
4–5 bicycles have been chained here for 12+ months, obstructing the pavement forcing buggies/wheelchairs onto the mud. Although the bikes never move, the covers were replaced. This appears to be unauthorised long-term storage of potentially stolen property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lowestoft Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned/Stored Bicycles on Footway, 11th March
item.description:
4–5 bicycles have been chained here for 12+ months, obstructing the pavement forcing buggies/wheelchairs onto the mud. Although the bikes never move, the covers were replaced. This appears to be unauthorised long-term storage of potentially stolen property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lowestoft Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the corner of Warren Street and Cleveland Street, roughly opposite 37 Warren St, 11th March
item.description:
I moved into an office at 37 Warren St last April. Since that time, this bicycle has been locked to this bike rack and has never moved. It is taking up space and could be donated to a bike repair charity.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128-134, Cleveland Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
